seoTitle: Patersonia vs Pawleena — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Patersonia and Pawleena. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Patersonia and Pawleena.
heading: Patersonia vs Pawleena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Patersonia, Tasmania and Pawleena, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Patersonia has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Pawleena (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Patersonia or Pawleena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Patersonia has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Pawleena scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Patersonia scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Pawleena scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Patersonia or Pawleena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Patersonia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
